'''Gyosha''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] resort world in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. [[Wilek Nereus]] had hoped to be appointed Governor of Gyosha, but got stuck on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] instead. [[OrulShai III]] was a moon of Gyosha.
